summary: Implemented reduced-motion handling and hidden-tab throttling (US-015). Created `src/ui/visibilityManager.ts` with `onHidden`/`onVisible` subscription hooks and `src/ui/motionManager.ts` with `isReduced()`/`onChange()` API. Wired visibility manager in `main.ts` to stop/start `ProbeSampler` and `MetricsAggregator` when tab is hidden/shown. The renderer retains its own inline visibility and motion listeners for the animation loop. Fixed a lint error in the generated motionManager test (unused variable). Added ADR-015 documenting the throttling strategy. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 253 unit tests, 42 e2e tests.
